en: Isabella wasn't happy, and she... Of course she's unhappy.
You ruined her proposal. No, no. She needed me to ruin her proposal, and then we did all this,
and the candle burned brighter, and the cracks... Mirabel. That's why I'm in the vision.
I'm saving the miracle. You have to stop, Mirabel.
Bruno left because of you. Luisa's losing her powers.
Isabella's out of control because of you.
I don't know why you weren't given a gift, but it is not an excuse for you
to hurt this family. I'm sorry.
I will never be good enough for you.
No matter how hard I try.
